catalogData.name: Time
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Cast Spell
powers.raw: Cast Spell (Complex Action): Cast Manabolt at Force/2

powers.name: Foresight
powers.raw: Foresight (Interrupt Action): You reroll Force/2 dice (excl Crit Dice) on a test. Can only use 1/day.
powers.text: You reroll Force/2 dice (excl Crit Dice) on a test. Can only use 1/day.

powers.name: Missing Time
powers.raw: Missing Time (Complex Action): Cast Alter Memory at Force, but can only erase memories not impant new ones
powers.text: Cast Alter Memory at Force, but can only erase memories not impant new ones

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Increase Reflexes or Sail at Force
powers.text: Cast Increase Reflexes or Sail at Force

powers.name: Temporal Slag
powers.raw: Temporal Slag (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Slow at Force, but must sustain
powers.text: Cast Slow at Force, but must sustain

greatFormPowers.name: Fate's Favor
greatFormPowers.raw: Fate's Favor (Trait): Gain 4 Edge instead of 1
